name: Player List Header Footer
desc: Sets text above and below the tab player list.

implementation.overview: S47 sets header and footer text on the tab player list. No module in the examined client sources directly targets this packet.

modules.name: Vanilla Handler (S47PacketPlayerListHeaderFooter)
modules.purpose: Server sends S47PacketPlayerListHeaderFooter to update the client. Processed by NetHandlerPlayClient. No module in the 500+ examined client sources specifically intercepts this packet.
